summary: Iteration-4 backend testing complete. Added 10 new pytest cases covering the 4 new feature areas (audit-all heat-map, apply-suggestion move/revert, constraints/similar search, optimize 'structured' field, PDF exports). Full regression of 38 prior tests was preserved and re-run. Result: 48/48 passing in 35.7s.
critical_code_review_comments: apply-suggestion 'move' with force=true silently deletes the destination cell (no audit trail) -- acceptable for MVP but consider preserving a rollback record once history feature lands.
audit-all loads up to 20,000 timetable cells in memory per call; fine for ~50 classes but should be paginated or streamed once schools scale beyond ~10k cells.

constraints/similar matches use case-insensitive substring on stringified condition.value -- works for current MN/HK abbreviations but may produce false positives if a value is a list/dict; ok for now.

Optimize endpoint may return empty 'structured' list when Claude does not produce parseable JSON; current contract just requires the key/type to exist, which is fine, but main agent may want to log a metric for parse failures.
test_credentials: Session injected via mongosh approach per /app/auth_testing.md (Super Admin role).
seed_data_creation: Tests rely on existing seeded Sri Ma Vidyalaya school (deep seed is idempotent and re-asserted in regression). No new persistent seed created; transient TEST_-prefixed teacher/subject/activity rows are created and cleaned up by the suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py now contains 48 tests organised in iteration sections (1-3 baseline + iteration-4 at the bottom). Conftest fixture auto-injects a Super Admin session per test session. New iteration-4 classes: TestAuditAll, TestApplySuggestion, TestConstraintsSimilar, TestOptimizeStructured, TestPDFExports. The apply-suggestion test re-runs autogen on Grade 6 - A so it self-heals; PDF tests assert 200 + content-type application/pdf + %PDF magic bytes + size > 1000.
